title: MC Re-Imagined
description: Overhauls Minecraft with new Dimensions, Magic, Skills, Animals, and more!
body:
Minecraft Re-Imagined is a modpack designed to overhaul the vanilla experience without drifting too far from the core game. 
Featuring:
- 20+ New Dimensions to explore
- QOL mods like EasyMobFarm and inventory sorters
- Shader support
- Terrain Generation overhaul
- Towns, villages, outposts, dungeons, and so many more location got overhauled
- Magic system
- Skill System
- Distant Horizons
- and so much more!
The pack comes with a few great shaders that perform well and work with Distant Horizons.
